core_offer: Global platform for payroll, freelance payments, and invoice management
products: EasyStaff Payroll — pay remote teams and freelancers globally with built-in compliance and B2B contracts
EasyStaff Invoice — freelancers receive payments worldwide without foreign bank accounts
EasyStaff Connect — hire freelancers, manage projects, task marketplace
target_audience: Companies that hire and pay freelancers/contractors internationally
value_proposition: Pay anyone, anywhere, anytime with compliance handled
pricing_model: From 4% per task (visible in UI mockup)
